title: Stay Behind: My Grandfather's Secret War
original_title: Stay behind - min farfars hemmelige krig
overview: Did Ida's grandfather live a double life as a secret agent during the cold war? Ida and her father believe that their beloved father and grandfather worked directly for the CIA during the Cold War in Denmark.
